calendar.matters:
Status Conference Re: Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-17-2014 Off Calendar

Status Conference Re: Accounting
Off Calendar Feb-04-2014 Continued To Mar-24-14 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848
Robert Cohen, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, CrediTrade Association, Inc., dba Great.
Bret A. Yaple, Esq., appearing for Defendant Praxedes B. Demesa, et al.,
Status Conference Re: Accounting is scheduled this day.
Court ordered attorney Robert Cohen to personally speak to counsel of record for Plaintiff Stephen M. Kappos and tell Mr. Kappos that the court is ordering this matter continued to March 24, 2014 at 11:00 AM, in Department 514, for a further Status Conference re: Accounting. Court ordered parties to file and serve Case Management Conference Statements at least 10 days before March 24, 2014. Court ordered Mr. Yaple to serve accounting documents filed this morning. Court ordered Mr. Cohen to tell Mr. Kappos that he is ordered to file a declaration regarding any efforts by Mr. Kappos or any employee on his behalf for compliance with the court's order of Dec. 16, 2013 issued by this court. Mr. Kappos to file and serve his accounting documents and declaration at least 21 days prior to March 24, 2014, with courtesy copies directly to department 514.
Court adjourned.

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Bret A. Yaple, Esq., appearing for Defendant and moving party. Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff and Responding party Creditors Trade Association
Defendant Praxedes B. Demesa, aka Sedy Demesa, aka Praxedes Sedy Demesa, individually and as Guarantor of Pleasant Care Corporation's Motion to Set Aside or Vacate Judgment is scheduled today.
After argument of respective counsel the court granted Defendant's Motion to set aside Judgment. Court ordered parties to meet and confer prior to next hearing date of 2/4/2014 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for Status Conference re: Accounting. Parties to file serve and provide courtesy copies of documents at least 5 court days before next hearing date.
Counsel for Defendant to submit proposed order fot the court's signature.
